fields.name: Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the entry, as assigned from the specified number series when the entry was created.

fields.name: Item Ledger Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies one or more item application entries for each inventory transaction that is posted.

fields.name: Inbound Item Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry corresponding to the inventory increase or positive quantity in inventory.

fields.name: Outbound Item Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the number of the item ledger entry corresponding to the inventory decrease for this entry.

fields.name: Quantity
fields.tooltip: Specifies the quantity of the item that is being applied from the inventory decrease in the Outbound Item Entry No. field, to the inventory increase in the Inbound Item Entry No. field.

fields.name: Posting Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the posting date that corresponds to the posting date of the item ledger entry, for which this item application entry was created.

fields.name: Transferred-from Entry No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the item ledger entry number of the original inventory increase of the item if the item application entry originates from a transfer.

fields.name: Creation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which this entry in the item application entry was originally created in this table.

fields.name: Created By User
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the user who originally posted the transaction that created this item application entry in this table.

fields.name: Last Modified Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date on which this item application entry was last changed. The item application is modified when the outbound transaction is applied to the inbound transaction.

fields.name: Last Modified By User
fields.tooltip: Specifies the code for the user who last changed this item application entry. The item application is modified when the outbound transaction is applied to the inbound transaction.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant code of the item.

fields.name: Latest Valuation Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the latest valuation date of the item ledger entry.

fields.name: Cost Application
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the application entry should have the cost forwarded or simply included in an average cost calculation.

fields.name: Output Completely Invd. Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the outbound item entries have been completely invoiced.

fields.name: Outbound Entry is Updated
fields.tooltip: Specifies that the cost of the related outbound item entry is already updated. If the field is selected, then the cost adjustment routine will not try to update any previous related outbound entries.
